description_long: This is a military jet aircraft with a sleek, angular fuselage and a camouflage paint scheme blending shades of brown, green, and tan. The wings are sharply swept back and mounted low on the fuselage, with prominent control surfaces and pylons for external stores. The tail section features a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers, forming a conventional tail design. The landing gear is extended, showing a tricycle configuration with two main wheels and a single nose wheel. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, enclosed by a clear canopy, and appears to be a single-seat design. Markings and insignia, including numbers and roundels, are visible on the fuselage and tail, indicating military use.
description: A camouflaged military jet with swept-back low wings, a single vertical tail, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. The aircraft features tricycle landing gear and detailed surface markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the angular, swept-back wings with visible landing gear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, camouflage pattern, wing sweep, and visible landing gear with military markings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the single engine exhaust, twin horizontal stabilizers, and the vertical tail fin with insignia.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the aircraft's profile, wing configuration, and extended landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with no visible winglets and slight anhedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle, retractable landing gear with two main units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
